landing.headline: How AI-Ready Are You?
landing.subhead: Find out in 5 minutes. Get your personalized readiness score — and optionally compare yourself with your team.
landing.feature1Desc: Rate your AI capabilities across 50+ tools and practices — quick and hands-on.
landing.feature2Desc: See where you stand on the AI development timeline — and how fast the gap is closing.
landing.feature3Desc: Optional: Invite your team and compare scores, spot strengths, and identify growth areas together.

features.title: Capability Assessment
features.subtitle: For each capability, select your usage level and indicate whether it's relevant to your work.
features.minRequired: Please answer at least {min} to continue
features.relevanceTooltip: Is this capability relevant to your daily work? If not, it won't be counted in your score calculation.
features.tierTooltip1: Foundational AI knowledge relevant to every professional today.
features.tierTooltip2: AI tools that are actively used and measurably improve daily work.
features.tierTooltip3: AI is fully integrated into daily workflows and used professionally every day.
features.tierTooltip4: AI automates recurring processes and orchestrates complex workflows.
features.tierTooltip5: Advanced AI integration: autonomous agents, cross-system connectivity, and organizational embedding.

postAssessment.title: Final Thoughts
postAssessment.topCategories: Which categories would have the biggest impact on your work?
postAssessment.topCategoriesHint: Please select at least one category.
postAssessment.freeText: Anything else you'd like to share?
postAssessment.freeTextPlaceholder: Optional: your thoughts on AI in your workflow...

results.title: Your AI Readiness Score
results.tierProgressTooltip: The percentage shows how many points you achieved in this category. Each capability is rated 0–3 (Not Aware → Regularly). The score is the sum of all ratings divided by the maximum (3 × number of relevant capabilities). Capabilities marked as "not relevant" are excluded.
results.growthPotential: With guided training: from {from}% to {to}% in 6 months
results.landscapeNote: Why does the score drop without training? New AI tools are released every month. Without learning them, your relative readiness slips by {gap} points — not because you forgot anything, but because the field moved on.
results.frontierNote: You're at the frontier — training keeps you there
results.maintainEdgeNote: Even top practitioners need to keep learning
results.zeroDeclineNote: The field will have moved far ahead without continuous learning
results.kmRadarDesc: How you navigate the AI information landscape across 5 dimensions
results.km_awareness_strong: You actively stay on top of AI developments and consult reliable sources.
results.km_awareness_neutral: You follow AI news occasionally but could be more consistent.
results.km_awareness_weak: You rarely follow AI developments and often feel behind the curve.
results.km_filtering_strong: You can confidently distinguish relevant AI signals from hype.
results.km_filtering_neutral: You sometimes struggle to separate genuinely useful AI insights from noise.
results.km_filtering_weak: You find it difficult to filter out AI hype from what's actually relevant.
results.km_contextualization_strong: You regularly translate AI knowledge into concrete improvements in your work.
results.km_contextualization_neutral: You understand AI concepts but don't always apply them directly.
results.km_contextualization_weak: You rarely connect AI learnings to practical steps in your day-to-day role.
results.km_overload_strong: You have a healthy balance — engaged with AI topics without feeling overwhelmed.
results.km_overload_neutral: You occasionally feel overloaded or somewhat disconnected from AI developments.
results.km_overload_weak: You're either overwhelmed by the volume of AI information or largely disengaged from it.
results.km_knowledgeTransfer_strong: AI knowledge sharing works well in your organization — learnings circulate effectively.
results.km_knowledgeTransfer_neutral: Some AI knowledge gets shared in your organization, but it's not yet systematic.
results.km_knowledgeTransfer_weak: AI knowledge sharing is largely absent in your organization — insights stay siloed.
results.usageMatrixDesc: Capabilities you find relevant — mapped against how much you actually use them
results.matrixPriorityGapsDesc: Relevant to you, but not yet mastered
results.matrixHiddenStrengthsDesc: Well-used, but not flagged as priority
results.selfPerceptionDesc: How did your initial estimate compare to your actual measured results?
results.comparisonDesc: How your estimates before and after the assessment compare to the measured results.
results.comparisonReadinessDesc: Your self-rated AI usage vs. the actual measured score
results.comparisonKnowledgeDesc: How confident you feel knowing the AI tools relevant to your work
results.comparisonUtilizationDesc: What share of your daily work is AI-assisted — and what could be
